nasb.text: Therefore, on account of you Zion will be plowed as a field, Jerusalem will become a heap of ruins, And the mountain of the temple will become high places of a forest.

esv.text: Therefore because of you Zion shall be plowed as a field; Jerusalem shall become a heap of ruins, and the mountain of the house a wooded height.

cnv.text: 所以，為你們的緣故， 錫安必像被耕種的田地， 耶路撒冷必變為亂堆， 這殿的山要成為叢林中的高岡。

ccb.text: 所以，因你们的缘故， 锡安必像田地被耕犁， 耶路撒冷必沦为废墟， 圣殿山必成为荒林之冈。
